shapes.frame_eqs_str: a['qw']=((a['mid_att']-a['treb'])*0.1); a['is']=(a['instance']+0.5); a['num']=a['num_inst']; a['in']=a['instance']; a['sample']=div(a['in'],a['num']); a['simp']=((a['sample']*2)-1); a['lfo']=(1+(1*Math.sin((a['time']*0.1)))); a['x2']=(0+((a['simp']*Math.sin(a['reg18']))*0.5)); a['y2']=(0+((a['simp']*Math.cos(a['reg18']))*0.5)); a['x']=((a['x2']+0.5)+div(0.2,a['num'])); a['y']=((a['y2']+0.5)+div(0.5,a['num'])); a['rad']=((3-(a['reg19']*a['reg17']))+(a['qw']*Math.sin((a['sample']+(a['simp']*a['time']))))); a['rad']=div(a['rad'],a['num']); a['x']=(a['x']+((0.2*a['lfo'])*Math.sin((a['simp']+(a['sample']*a['time']))))); a['y']=(a['y']+((0.2*a['lfo'])*Math.cos((a['simp']+(a['sample']*a['time']))))); a['tex_ang']=(a['qw']+(a['tex_ang']*Math.sin(a['simp'])));

waves.point_eqs_str: a['inst']=Math.floor((a['sample']*a['samples'])); a['div']=equal(div(a['inst'],2), Math.floor(div(a['inst'],2))); a['v1']=(a['value1']+Math.abs(a['value1'])); a['v2']=(a['value2']+Math.abs(a['value2'])); a['bal']=(a['v2']-a['v1']); a['reg17']=a['bal']; a['y2']=a['sample']; a['y']=a['sample']; a['r']=((Math.abs(a['div'])>0.00001)?((0.1-(0.04*(a['q1']+a['sample'])))):(0.7)); a['x']=(((Math.abs(a['div'])>0.00001)?((a['x']-0.1)):(a['x']))+a['bal']);
